## Task Outline

The following tasks decompose the architectural layout into actionable units, ordered by execution hierarchy (dependencies first).

### [Task ID]: [Task Title]

- **Description**: [What needs to be done, concisely.]
- **Inputs**: [Files, requirements, or preceding outputs required for this task]
- **Outputs**: [Files, artifacts, or state changes produced by this task]
- **Acceptance Criteria**:
  - [ ] [Criterion 1]
  - [ ] [Criterion 2]
  - [ ] [Criterion 3]
- **Dependencies**: [e.g., None or Task ID]

## Done Criteria

PLAN's work is complete when ALL of the following are satisfied:

- [ ] Every product requirement from `docs/03_Stories/stories.md` is mapped to at least one task
- [ ] Every architectural component from `docs/03_Stories/architecture.md` has a corresponding task
- [ ] Tasks are atomic, developer-ready, and executable without further clarification
- [ ] Every task includes title, description, inputs, outputs, acceptance_criteria, and dependencies
- [ ] Task dependencies are clearly mapped and logically sequenced
- [ ] `docs/04_Tasks/tasks.md` is generated and follows this template
- [ ] All blocking open questions are answered
